Drop-In Hockey 

Adult Drop-In Hockey Sessions are ages 18+
All Players Must Wear Full Gear
All Players Must Check In At Front Desk
No Refunds or Credits

Drop-In Hockey 

Adult Drop-In Hockey Sessions are ages 18+
All Players Must Wear Full Gear
All Players Must Check In At Front Desk
No Refunds or Credits

-The session is for Figure Skaters FS1 or higher.
-Priority of right of way is in the following order:
          1) Skaters in Programs
          2) Skaters in Lesson
          3) All other freestyle skaters
-Please be mindful of your surroundings


Freestyle Rules:

- All Skaters must check in at Front desk before entering Ice
- NO Virtual/Zoom Lessons
- NO Refunds, Credits, Session changes or exchanges.
- NO Waitlist for Full Sessions

-The session is for Figure Skaters FS1 or higher.
-Priority of right of way is in the following order:
          1) Skaters in Programs
          2) Skaters in Lesson
          3) All other freestyle skaters
-Please be mindful of your surroundings


Freestyle Rules:

- All Skaters must check in at Front desk before entering Ice
- NO Virtual/Zoom Lessons
- NO Refunds, Credits, Session changes or exchanges.
- NO Waitlist for Full Sessions

OIC - Gretzky Hour

Full Hockey Gear Required
Each player is required to check in at the front desk before each session and must wear their sticker receipt visible on their pants.
Full USA Hockey Certified equipment is required.
Limit 40 skaters and 4 goalies.
Program Fee: $21 per session Players and Goalies must pay the full fee per session. No outside or private coaches are allowed on the ice at any time. - Unless approved through management.
All participants must be accompanied by a registered instructor.

-The session is for Figure Skaters FS1 or higher.
-Priority of right of way is in the following order:
          1) Skaters in Programs
          2) Skaters in Lesson
          3) All other freestyle skaters
-Please be mindful of your surroundings


Freestyle Rules:

- All Skaters must check in at Front desk before entering Ice
- NO Virtual/Zoom Lessons
- NO Refunds, Credits, Session changes or exchanges.
- NO Waitlist for Full Sessions
All participants must be accompanied by a registered instructor.

Private Hockey Lessons

Players must be on the ice with a Sharks Ice private coach!

Oakland Bears In-House Hockey Spring 2026! 

Bears In-House Hockey Spring 2026
Oakland Ice is excited to announce the registration is now open for the 2026 Spring Season!

Spring season will begin on Monday April 6th, 2026. 

Spring season will end on Saturday June 27th, 2026.
